policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support on business days.
policies.trial: We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan.

product.name: AutoStream
product.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more.
